name: Mike
subject: Fwd: Promises made and delivered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for Indiana
body:
I am truly humbled to receive such kind words from an impressive and groundbreaking Governor like Nikki Haley. She has been instrumental for South Car
---
| Friend,

I am truly humbled to receive such kind words from an impressive and groundbreaking Governor like Nikki Haley. She has been instrumental for South Carolina in implementing the commonsense, solutions-based reforms that have kept our state growing for the past four years.

I am also humbled to know that when our campaign is under attack, I can always count on your support to help us through. **That is why I’m reaching out to you today, friend. **

**My team has set the ambitious goal of raising $45,000 before our 2nd quarter deadline expires TONIGHT. **While it may be ambitious, it is also achievable but only with your help. **[Can you contribute $20 or whatever you can today](http://links.mikepence.com/u/455c4382a47d4d77bf7c1bfbe8285783?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=20&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_header_amount&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160630-fwd-promises-made-and-delivered-3611-direct-b) **to help us continue to promote our positive agenda that will keep Indiana moving forward?

Help us send a message that all Hoosiers are united behind our common vision of making Indiana a model state for the nation to follow.

**[Chip in today to make an immense difference in our fight for re-election. ](http://links.mikepence.com/u/785631de4c694f6ebe58aea9e36df27d?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=59&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_header_amount&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160630-fwd-promises-made-and-delivered-3611-direct-b)**

Thank you,
Mike

On Thu, Jun 30, 2016 at 7:00 AM, Governor Nikki Haley <[communications@mikepence.com](http://links.mikepence.com/u/e38b089c192546c599d3465eb3ab0b6d?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_header_email&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160630-fwd-promises-made-and-delivered-3611-direct-b)> sent: |
| [](http://links.mikepence.com/u/5f3c73ce645447b680a11d13ec765be3?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160630-fwd-promises-made-and-delivered-3611-direct-b) |
| Friend,

Republicans know that real reforms don’t come from a top-down approach from Washington, D.C. They happen right here at home, in our states.

Our frustration comes from a government that has grown day after day, year after year, yet doesn't serve us any better. The problem is that we hear the same, endless conversations over and over again, making promises and never keeping them.

That is why Republicans value the efforts and the leadership of our nation’s Governors – **and one example of a leader who has made promises and gone above and beyond in delivering on them is Governor Mike Pence.**

Mike’s vision is one that lifts up all Hoosiers and moves Indiana forward with commonsense, conservative principles – and he’s been able to do a lot in his first term.

Mike believes in the notion that encouraging American innovation and success instead of demonizing it can truly lift our economy and create lasting jobs.

**This November, my friend Mike is running for re-election.** I wanted to take this opportunity to reach out to you personally and ask for your help in delivering a victory for him on Election Day.

**Mike is up against a big deadline at the end of the month. Midnight tonight, their public report is due, [so I hope that you can contribute $20 or whatever you can to Team Pence](http://links.mikepence.com/u/e9e5908e7df0492a99305054cf3a49ac?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=20&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount_1&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160630-fwd-promises-made-and-delivered-3611-direct-b) so that they can finish this quarter strong and continue leaving a legacy that Indiana can be proud of.**

In 2016, we have big decisions to make. Our country and our leaders are being tested. But we've been tested in the past, and our people have always risen to the challenge.

[**Help support Mike by contributing $20 or whatever you can by MIDNIGHT tonight to his re-election campaign.**](http://links.mikepence.com/u/6ef106f4e2504269b4e78b78d66ac1ff?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=20&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount_2&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160630-fwd-promises-made-and-delivered-3611-direct-b)

Thank you,
Nikki Haley
South Carolina Governor |
| [Contribute](http://links.mikepence.com/u/603b1c4acbfc4dab8dfb21d6c77c199a?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_footer_text&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160630-fwd-promises-made-and-delivered-3611-direct-b) |

body:
We only have a few more hours. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4374/1c469400/623946d/356c06e/80651539/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq12_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq12_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq12_rdf&utm_medium=ema") Friend, One week ago, I asked for your help. We had just increased our end-of-quarter goal to $250,000. It was a steep goal -- but I knew that, with your support, we would reach it. **Each dollar in the door gets us one step closer to reaching our $250,000 end-of-quarter goal. We only have a few hours left, and we're so close.** **[Will you make your first contribution today of just $5 to help us cross the finish line?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4374/1c469400/623946d/356c06e/80651539/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq12_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq12_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq12_rdf&utm_medium=ema")** Our campaign is about putting the people first, not the right-wing special interest groups and the Koch brothers. And I'm so grateful that everyone from President Obama and Senator Elizabeth Warren to supporters like you stepped up to the plate and helped us out. **[We're almost at our goal, and we couldn't have made it this far without you. Help us sprint through the finish line for a great quarter.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4374/1c469400/623946d/356c06e/80651539/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq12_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq12_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq12_rdf&utm_medium=ema") ** Let's get this done. Time is running short Peter, so I'll get right to the point.

Earlier today, Mr. Trump sent you a message regarding the urgent need to get you on board with the campaign at this critical time (if you missed it, you can read it below).

**Mr. Trump pays close attention to campaign data and he's looking for at least 2,300 additional donors before Midnight.

Peter, reviewing our records I noticed you haven't responded yet**.

Can you chip in just $3 to help us meet this goal before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT?

**[CHIP IN $3](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11uiTczAdjaI6vloKzQEUb44N)**

I know you don't want to see Hillary Clinton elected to the White House. She won't just carry on Barack Obama's radical agenda if elected - _she'll be even worse_.

As Mr. Trump has said, she's a disaster . . . and the American people have already suffered long enough under the inept and corrupt career politicians.

[**So please, join us and stand with Mr. Trump today with a $3 contribution**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11uiXbUVE2wd4u5AC9f0D9Gao).

Every additional donor tonight will make a difference in our fight to Make America Great Again.

Thank you.

Sincerely,

Brad Parscale

Help us hit our goal before midnight | Friend --

In every big moment of this campaign, you’ve come through for me. You stood by my side through a tough primary, and now that we’re facing Donald Trump, we need to make it clear to the world that we're standing together again.

name: Tracy Newman
subject: Why this week matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Let's finish the week strong. | [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTE0MTI1MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTYwMDMzNDMwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Dear Friend, What a week! In less than three hours, we're going to have to close the books on our monthly fundraising deadline. Soon our campaign will have to report the numbers. And right now we need your support. Here's why: This week has been profoundly consequential for our campaign and our state. In fact, this week has been the perfect illustration of the dynamics of this race. Last Friday, President Obama came to town to support Jay Inslee -- he talked about their shared progressive values and vision for an economy that works for everyone. And the very next day, the chair of the Republican Governors Association came to town to kick off our opponent's campaign. [**If you 're on President Obama and Governor Inslee's side, step up today to support our campaign before our end-of-month deadline!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTE0MTI1MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTYwMDMzNDMwS0&mt=1&rt=0) On one hand, we have a champion for progress, economic justice, and common sense reforms on issues that matter to all of us, like gun safety and immigration. On the other hand, we have a group, the RGA, that's in lockstep with the NRA and the Koch brothers, and supports an economy built for the billionaires -- not for the rest of us. So now, it's never been more important to finish this week strong. [**Will you contribute $5 RIGHT NOW, before our deadline at midnight? With your help we can build on our momentum!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=OTE0MTI1MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTYwMDMzNDMwS0&mt=2&rj=OTYwMDMzNDMwS0&rt=0) Thanks, Tracy Newman | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=OTE0MTI1MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTYwMDMzNDMwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Eric Hyers
subject: the dark money has landed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

It's just beginning. This week the Koch brothers-backed group, Americans for Prosperity, started attacking Steve -- mailing glossy flyers filled with wildly misleading information to voters across the state.
It's no surprise. After all, Greg Gianforte has donated to Americans for Prosperity. Last year he was the keynote speaker at an AFP conference. And a Koch-aligned Super PAC continues to raise money for him.

This isn't how elections should work in Montana. **We can't let Greg Gianforte 's dark money, out-of-state, Koch-affiliated allies distort the truth about Steve's record. [Help us stand against the Koch-backed Americans for Prosperity and pitch in $15 today.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ibgsa9vjAX1cLIxv9sQ25DxLsJQ9NtZE)**

Montanans had a good chuckle when AFP sent out a press release referencing "millions of Montanans" and another that referred to the "University of Montana Bozeman campus" (which of course doesn't exist). But it's not a laughing matter that they can spend nearly unlimited resources to try to buy yet another governor's office as a test lab for their agenda -- especially when they so clearly don't understand what makes our state great.

This election should be decided by Montanans, not the Koch brothers. Steve is doing a great job running our state -- let's not let big out-of-state money get away with trying to convince voters otherwise. **[Please chip in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Uz3LNkI6qAzP02yi%2BuUKmzxLsJQ9NtZE)**

Thanks,

Eric

_This is our Link of the Week email -- the things that we're sharing around the office, and we think everyone on Team Maggie should know about. We hope you'll enjoy clicking around as much as we do._
Kelly Ayotte and Donald Trump agree on a dangerous agenda that would pull us backwards. But try asking Ayotte about her support for Trump... Good luck! She might as well change her name to Kelly Runaway-otte.

name: Matt Gregory
subject: Rob fights for small businesses
body:
| Peter -- My name is Matt Gregory, and I work at Gregory Industries in Canton, Ohio. We are a fifth generation family-owned small business, and we manufacture guardrails and other highway construction products to help keep families safe on roads across the country.

Rob Portman is one of us and he understands the challenges facing small businesses. I’m honored to stand with over 50 small businesses from across Ohio this week as we launch the Portman for Senate Small Business Coalition. [Rob fought to help save our company](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D-qxdfZ4YVCk&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gregory_tv&n=1), and he fights every day for policies that allow small businesses to grow and create more jobs and opportunities for workers across Ohio. Matthew Gregory Executive Vice President Gregory Industries [

name: Bob Fertik & Heidi Sieck, Democrats.com
subject: Let's #VOTEPROCHOICE to Defeat ALL Anti-abortion Republicans
body:
| | | [](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128601MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01)
---|---|---
| Dear Activist, On Monday, the Supreme Court made history by overturning the Texas law (HB2) designed to close 75% of the state's abortion clinics by forcing them to meet the costly standards of surgical centers.

While this is a huge **legal** victory for women's reproductive rights, unfortunately the **political** battle isn't over - not at all.

**[That's why we're asking you to pledge to vote only for prochoice candidates in 2016](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128602MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01).**

After the Texas ruling, Trump said "if Scalia was replaced by me... **it would have been the opposite.** " Trump hopes to name "as many as five" Supreme Court Justices, and declared "I will appoint judges that will be pro-life" - chosen by the rightwing Federalist Society.

Trump's judges would **overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and criminalize abortion**, sending ob/gyns to jail for murder - and possibly their women patients too. [](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128603MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01) And state and local Republican politicians are even fiercer in their opposition to abortion than Trump and will not be deterred by this Supreme Court ruling. Instead, they will continue to pass laws and regulations to cut funding for Planned Parenthood, harass clinics, and coerce women into forced childbirth, even in cases of rape and incest.

So there is really only one way to stop them: by **defeating every anti-abortion Republican** from Donald Trump down to local office.

**[Will you pledge to #VOTEPROCHOICE](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128604MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01)?**

We believe 2016 is the best chance we'll ever get, because **Hillary Clinton will inspire millions of women to vote for a true prochoice champion**.

So to make sure we win from top to bottom, we are mobilizing the prochoice majority to vote not only for Hillary, but also for **prochoice candidates down the entire ballot**.

Our campaign is called [**#VOTEPROCHOICE**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128605MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01) and our success depends entirely on you.

Here's what we really need you to do:

1\. **[Pledge to vote only for prochoice candidates at all levels](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128606MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01)**
2\. [Ask all your prochoice friends to join you](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128607MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01)
3\. Help us build support on [Facebook](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128608MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01), [Instagram](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128609MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01), [Tumblr ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128610MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01) and [Twitter](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128611MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01)
4\. [Volunteer to join or organize a local chapter of #VOTEPROCHOICE](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128612MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01)

This is a grassroots effort and we will not ask you for money. Instead we desperately need your passion and commitment.

**[Will you pledge to #VOTEPROCHOICE](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128613MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01)?**
Thanks for all you do!

Bob Fertik & Heidi Sieck, Co-founders
[**#VOTEPROCHOICE**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128614MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-01)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Monsanto
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
The corporate interests are at it again. Monsanto, agribusiness and the bio-tech industry have spent hundreds of millions of dollars trying to overturn legislation passed by Vermont, Connecticut, Maine and Alaska that calls for the labeling of GMO food. **In fact, they are moving aggressively now because Vermont's strong law goes into effecttoday.**
This legislation is important because people have a right to know what is in the food they and their children eat. The more information we have, the better consumers we become. This is not a radical idea. It is why over 60 countries around the world have passed GMO labeling laws.
Unfortunately, the major agribusiness and bio-tech companies disagree. They do not believe people have a right to know what's in the food they eat. That is why they have spent hundreds of millions of dollars in lobbying and campaign contributions to overturn the GMO right-to-know legislation that states have already passed and that many other states are on the verge of passing.
A bill in the Senate would overrule Vermont's law, and prevent states from passing similar laws. This bill, introduced by Senators Pat Roberts (R-KS) and Debbie Stabenow (D-MI) will be coming up for a vote on Wednesday or Thursday of next week. **It must be defeated.**
[**Can you write to your senators today and ask them to oppose the GMO bill? You can click here and we'll direct you to write your senators immediately.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/speakout/stop-the-gmo-labeling-bill?source=em160701 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/speakout/stop-the-gmo-labeling-bill?source=em160701")
[Write to
your senators](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/speakout/stop-the-gmo-labeling-bill?source=em160701 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/speakout/stop-the-gmo-labeling-bill?source=em160701")
Their goal is to deny states the right to go forward in this area and to pass legislation that is useless and with no value to consumers. And, if we don't stop them, they may just succeed.
On Thursday evening, with no hearings and no debate, a corporate-backed bill was introduced on to the floor by Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
This legislation would create a confusing, misleading and unenforceable national standard for labeling GMOs. Instead of a uniform labeling standard like Vermont's law, the language allows text, symbols, or an electronic code to be used. This is intentionally confusing to consumers, and the information may be entirely inaccessible if the consumer does not have access to the internet.
Perhaps most shockingly, this bill imposes no penalties whatsoever for violating the labeling requirement, making the law essentially meaningless. Thus, this is a weak bill, full of loopholes, without any requirement to comply.
The issue of labeling our food isn't controversial. The overwhelming majority of Americans favor GMO labeling. People have a right to know what is in the food they eat. The Senate shouldn't stop states from passing laws that let that happen.
Congress must stand up to the demands of Monsanto and other multi-national food industry corporations and reject this outrageous, weak, and confusing bill. I will continue to do my best to defeat it, and take the necessary action to protect Vermont's GMO labeling efforts. But I need you with me in order to ensure its defeat.
[**Click here to write to your senators today and say that you want them to oppose this GMO labeling bill. States should be able to decide for themselves - without multinational corporations getting involved - if they want their food to be labeled.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/speakout/stop-the-gmo-labeling-bill?source=em160701 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/speakout/stop-the-gmo-labeling-bill?source=em160701")
Thanks for standing up to Monsanto on this issue.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political_revolution?refcode=em160701-gmo "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political_revolution?refcode=em160701-gmo")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). ---
| Endorsements, debates, early voting and our first radio ad! Yes, Team Scott is kicking into high gear ahead of the holiday weekend to celebrate our Independence Day. A few of this week’s highlights from the state’s most energetic and hardworking campaign are below.

**PHIL CONTINUES TO GET STRONG SUPPORT FROM STATE LEGISLATORS**
Phil has already received **the endorsement from 56 of the 61 Republican state legislators** and this week earned additional praise and support from across the state. The entire Northeast Kingdom Republican delegation has endorsed Phil for Governor, with **legislators representing _every town_ in the NEK’s Caledonia, Orleans and Essex Counties **[**announcing their support**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=970b8a11de&e=19cebfe173)**.** **Twelve Republican lawmakers from**[**Rutland County**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7e17a144d5&e=19cebfe173) and **three more from**[**Lamoille County**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c41b826f96&e=19cebfe173) also elaborated upon their enthusiastic support of Phil for Governor.

We think they said it best, so hear it straight from them below:

“As governor, **Phil will put Vermont back on the path toward _economic growth_**.” – Sen. Joe Benning of Caledonia County (Source: [Caledonia Record](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=30737462de&e=19cebfe173))

“While some of his opponents have engaged in D.C. tactics in an attempt to spread falsehoods about his record, **Phil has run a positive campaign _focused on Vermonters_**.” – Rep. Constance Quimby of Essex County (Source: [Caledonia Record](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=58d97ada03&e=19cebfe173))

“As governor, **he will be a champion for _addressing the growing crisis of affordability_ and _restoring faith and trust in state government_** ,” Rep. Paul Lefebvre of Essex County (Source: [Caledonia Record](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1162965ebc&e=19cebfe173))

“I’m confident that I speak on behalf of all three of the Lamoille County lawmakers who have endorsed Phil when I say that **he is the _right choice_ to be Vermont’s next governor**.” – State Sen. Rich Westman of Lamoille County (Source: [Stowe Reporter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=14b10a2b59&e=19cebfe173))

“Phil is honest, his word is his bond. Phil works extremely well with all parties in a way which **_serves all Vermonters_ , not just some Vermonters or one party**.” – Rep. Gary Viens of Orleans County (Source: [Caledonia Record](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7a872bb29b&e=19cebfe173))

“It’s time to change the paradigm from what it has been for the last six years; **Phil will bring _much needed patience and experience_ to Montpelier** so that decisions are publicly informed and put Vermont back on a track toward economic growth.” – Sen. Peg Flory of Rutland County (Source: [Mountain Times](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d21a4b37ca&e=19cebfe173))
| [](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kwBS0_DPiss)
---

***

**CAMPAIGN PROFILES:**
A number of media outlets have ramped up their coverage of gubernatorial candidate’s campaigns in anticipation of the August 9th primary, which is just 38 days away.

The Rutland Herald and Seven Days nicely profiled the contrast between our opponent and us to show that Team Scott is running a positive campaign that focuses on what Vermonters have been telling us – that the state is unaffordable. We are proud to be able to focus on the important issues through a positive lens.

[READ THE RUTLAN HERALD ARTICLE HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=493a2269e8&e=19cebfe173)

[READ THE SEVEN DAYS ARTICLE HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1a5f43f0be&e=19cebfe173)

*******

**A CLEAR CHOICE IN THIS ELECTION**
Multiple debates this week – focused on topics of community health and services, wind energy and economic issues in Southern Vermont and the Northeast Kingdom – illustrated that there is a clear choice in this election. As **the only candidate that serves as both a small business owner and a statewide office holder** , Phil has the experience, character and vision to **tackle our crisis of affordability, strengthen the economy and restore faith and trust in state government**.

Phil elaborated on his plans to improve the economy and modernize state government to increase efficiency, while providing the leadership to bring people together to responsibly address our energy opportunities, health care challenges and support vulnerable Vermonters.

In a forum presented by the Brattleboro Area Chamber of Commerce, Phil committed to **making the economy his top priority**. As Phil stated, **population loss and an aging demographic are decimating our workforce** (read more on his plan to address these issues [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9333ce65cd&e=19cebfe173)). While his opponents offered their support for a mandated increase in the minimum wage to $15, **Phil made it clear _he would not support this mandate_ as it would negatively impact small businesses, and have a ripple effect that “ratchets up the cost of living.”** Read more from Phil during the Southern Vermont-focused debate [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=18bb8dbf9f&e=19cebfe173).

Addressing our community health issues at a forum hosted by the **Vermont Association for Mental Health and Addiction Recovery** , Phil noted he would work to find savings in the state budget by **_eliminating inefficiencies and reallocating administrative costs_ to better fund critical health and mental health services, rather than continuing to overtax Vermonters**. Read more from Phil during the community health forum [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c22b4f3632&e=19cebfe173).

Phil stood up for the Northeast Kingdom in a forum in Irasburg, where he said “the Northeast Kingdom, in particular, has unfairly been a dumping ground for a lot of different initiatives in Vermont, unfairly...we need to protect this area, we need to protect its culture.” Read more from Phil during the NEK forum [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a5b038ed6c&e=19cebfe173).

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT

***

**VOTE FOR PHIL _NOW_! – EARLY PRIMARY VOTING IS UNDERWAY!**

We know, we sound like a broken record – but don’t forget **early voting for the August 9 primary is now open in all towns – so get to your town clerk’s office TODAY and vote for Phil**(find your town clerk [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=83ca155a30&e=19cebfe173))**!** **Phil has the grassroots support from Vermonters**. **_Let’s send a clear message_ in the primary that carries through to the General Election! **

Once you’ve voted, **let your friends, families and neighbors know by sharing our “I Voted Phil Scott” image on your social networks**. Click [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=14f92d93cb&e=19cebfe173) to get the image. Let everyone know you not only support Phil, but got to the voting booth early!

**AND WHILE YOU’RE SHARING**
Be sure to check out – and share – Phil Scott for Vermont’s first radio ad by clicking [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e90afd0f0f&e=19cebfe173). **Phil will continue to run a campaign focused on the issues and how he’ll help Vermonters. **Read the official press release [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=221420d956&e=19cebfe173).

***

**WALKING, BIKING AND CRUISING FOR VERMONTERS**

Team Scott didn’t just hit the road on our mobile campaign office this week, we also hit the road with sneakers and bikes in support of two important causes. Phil participated in the **Lamoille Area Cancer Network’s LACiNg Up for Cancer Walk** , while Team Scott also took part in the **Long Trail Century Ride** to benefit Vermont adaptive ski and sports. Back on Blizzard, we stopped by the **Brattleboro Savings and Loan** , and had a great turn out for the **Waterbury “Not Quite Independence Day” Parade**.

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT

Want to support Team Scott over the holiday weekend? We’re participating in several parades around the state. Check out our events [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6292963145&e=19cebfe173) to see where you can join Team Scott in a parade to show your support for Phil. No one does a parade better than Team Scott, so we hope you can join us!

***

**ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS**

**_“Phil Scott will bring prosperity”_**
“Our next Governor must propose and enforce spending limits and require more efficiencies, all in a ‘win-win’ manner. It's a tough job but it can be done. It must be done, and the best candidate to do it is Phil Scott." – Paul Carroccio (Source: Bennington Banner: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f4bb7b2375&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil on healthcare and the economy_**
“We're trying to put people back to work, making sure we have something that's vibrant and that we're living within our means, and healthcare is an essential part of that.” (Source: WPTZ: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a5cab1f092&e=19cebfe173))

***

**ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS**

**_Burlington Free Press: VT retailers say GMO label unclear_**
Vermont’s GMO labeling law, requiring that products containing genetically engineered food be labeled, goes into effect today. Whether you agree with this law or not, it’s unfortunate that small businesses often bear the burden of unintended consequences and unclear laws. The Burlington Free Press covered that burden this week, with an article on the impact of this law on local retailers who aren’t sure what they’re responsible for in the labeling process and how it will impact their businesses, and their vendors. This is an example of why it’s critical to listen and learn when creating new policy and regulation. As Governor, Phil will keep an open line of communication with Vermont businesses to make certain state government understands the impact of its actions. Read the full article [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3f99f37a15&e=19cebfe173).

Thanks to everyone that came out to events and participated in meetings this week. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities everyday – and share your thoughts – [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=03813b7fb6&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e5308287ef&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,
Team Scott

body:
We're all so grateful to you | Friend --

Yesterday marked the first quarterly deadline since Hillary and Trump became their party’s respective nominees, and here’s what we know:
* Our team raised $68.5 million for the campaign in June -- that’s an AMAZING accomplishment, and a huge portion of it came from online supporters like you.
* Because of you, we're moving forward with opening dozens of new field offices and hiring hundreds of new organizers in key states this summer.
* More than 1.5 million grassroots donors have stepped up to say you’re committed to stopping Donald Trump -- and to breaking the highest glass ceiling in America.

We’re all so grateful to you -- no one more so than Hillary. But while we celebrate our accomplishment, we also need to be clear (but not overconfident) about what we’re up against in this election.

Donald Trump’s campaign hasn’t yet announced how much money they raised in June, but Trump said earlier this week that if they come up short, he’ll simply write himself a check to make up the difference.

If he follows through with that, it could change this election. We can’t rest on our laurels and assume we have this in the bag. I know a lot of people have a hard time picturing Donald Trump making decisions in the Oval Office. But it could happen. We have to take that seriously. Just look at the polls: We’re only up by one point in Colorado. We’re tied in Ohio. In North Carolina, Trump is up by two.

So we’re going to keep working our tails off, and we’re not taking anything for granted. In the primary, we fought for every delegate, and we won. In the general, we’re going to fight for every vote -- and we’re going to win again. That’s why this team is so critical: Every time you **[volunteer for an hour](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4OTAyOTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMTgwNTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**, **[chip in $1](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU4OTAyOTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMTgwNTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)** , or help get the word out on **[Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU4OTAyOTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMTgwNTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)** or **[Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU4OTAyOTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMTgwNTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)** , you’re doing the work that will win this election.

We have to win. This is a pivotal moment in our nation’s history. Our core American values like equality, freedom of religion, and freedom of speech are under attack -- if we lose, we could slide back into something really scary.

I firmly believe that in moments like these, when a real threat comes, you don’t stay silent. You stand up and you fight for what you believe in. That’s what this team is doing. And 20 or even 50 years from now, you’re going to be able to tell your children and grandchildren that in the face of bigotry and hatred, you stood up for tolerance and understanding, for love and kindness, for the future of our country and our world.

That’s no small thing, and I don’t take it lightly -- neither does Hillary. Thank you so much for being part of this team. The world is counting on us to succeed, and with you in the fight, I know we will. Forward,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

clean_body: We're all so grateful to you | Friend -- Yesterday marked the first quarterly deadline since Hillary and Trump became their party’s respective nominees, and here’s what we know: Our team raised $68.5 million for the campaign in June -- that’s an AMAZING accomplishment, and a huge portion of it came from online supporters like you. Because of you, we're moving forward with opening dozens of new field offices and hiring hundreds of new organizers in key states this summer. More than 1.5 million grassroots donors have stepped up to say you’re committed to stopping Donald Trump -- and to breaking the highest glass ceiling in America. We’re all so grateful to you -- no one more so than Hillary. But while we celebrate our accomplishment, we also need to be clear (but not overconfident) about what we’re up against in this election. Donald Trump’s campaign hasn’t yet announced how much money they raised in June, but Trump said earlier this week that if they come up short, he’ll simply write himself a check to make up the difference. If he follows through with that, it could change this election. We can’t rest on our laurels and assume we have this in the bag. I know a lot of people have a hard time picturing Donald Trump making decisions in the Oval Office. But it could happen. We have to take that seriously. Just look at the polls: We’re only up by one point in Colorado. We’re tied in Ohio. In North Carolina, Trump is up by two. So we’re going to keep working our tails off, and we’re not taking anything for granted. In the primary, we fought for every delegate, and we won. In the general, we’re going to fight for every vote -- and we’re going to win again. That’s why this team is so critical: Every time you , , or help get the word out on or , you’re doing the work that will win this election. We have to win. This is a pivotal moment in our nation’s history. Our core American values like equality, freedom of religion, and freedom of speech are under attack -- if we lose, we could slide back into something really scary. I firmly believe that in moments like these, when a real threat comes, you don’t stay silent. You stand up and you fight for what you believe in. That’s what this team is doing. And 20 or even 50 years from now, you’re going to be able to tell your children and grandchildren that in the face of bigotry and hatred, you stood up for tolerance and understanding, for love and kindness, for the future of our country and our world. That’s no small thing, and I don’t take it lightly -- neither does Hillary. Thank you so much for being part of this team. The world is counting on us to succeed, and with you in the fight, I know we will. Forward, Robby Robby Mook Campaign Manager Hillary for America | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than 1.5 million grassroots donors standing with her:** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: You could be the person who nominates Hillary at the convention!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Want to make history at the convention? | Friend --

I'm so proud of this entire team for everything we did to help Hillary become the first woman nominated for president by a major American political party. It’s something we all share -- everyone who donated, volunteered, phone banked, knocked on doors, and gave a little piece of themselves to get Hillary this far.

And for that reason, we want to make the moment when history gets made reflect the path that brought us to this point -- by doing something that's literally never been done before.

**We want a supporter to stand onstage in Philadelphia at the Democratic National Convention and give a speech nominating Hillary on behalf of the Democratic Party.**

**[You could be that person. All you have to do is submit a video about what Hillary’s nomination means to you and why it’s important to elect her as our next president, and you could be chosen to give a speech nominating Hillary in Philadelphia.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU4OTA4MzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMTg0MjQ5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

In just a few weeks, we’ll shatter one of the highest glass ceilings in America. We make history in every election, but this particular moment is one historians will be writing about a century from now -- the campaign where we showed our daughters they truly can be whoever they want to be, and we proved to the world that we consider men and women equally fit to hold the highest office in the land.

You've already been part of that -- now you can help to define it. Hillary’s gotten this far thanks to the team that’s working to break down barriers for all Americans -- including you. **Tell us your story and why you care about this fight.
